summary: Tested dashboard/profit freshness + Sales Reconciliation feature end-to-end. All 27 backend tests pass (13 new freshness/recon + 14 regression). All freshness fields (last_computed_at, was_recomputed) present on dashboard-year-summary, monthly-profit, monthly-party. Recompute is fast (0.23s for 11767 txns - well within production scaling). Math check verified: visible_net_after_returns_kg = grand - excluded - unassigned (diff 0.0000 kg). Frontend: dashboard-freshness, profit-freshness, sales-reconciliation-page all render correctly with all required data-testids, refresh buttons work, toast shows 'Refreshed 11,767 transactions', sidebar entry exists under Analytics & ML, 343-item reconciliation table loads with filter tabs and search.

issues: Pre-existing console warning: 'width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' from Recharts containers (not introduced by this change)

critical_code_review_comments: Recompute completes in 0.23s for 11767 transactions on preview; for production's 39K+ txns this should still complete well under 5s - safe to redeploy.
Sales reconciliation endpoint is properly auth-gated (401 without token, 403 for executive) per backend tests.
Freshness model is well-designed: ensure_year_summary_fresh auto-recomputes on stale read, then returns was_recomputed flag so UI can show fresh-just-now state.

Math invariant verified live: grand 1668.895 - excluded 0.029 - unassigned 1668.866 = visible 0.000 (all items currently unassigned in preview - this is data state, not a code bug; the 'Hidden: Unassigned stamp' card surfaces this clearly to the user as intended).

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all UI elements verified, refresh flow + toast confirmed)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing 11767 transactions in preview DB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Freshness + Sales Reconciliation feature fully validated. Preview ready for production redeploy. Endpoints verified: /api/analytics/summary-status, /api/analytics/recompute-summaries, /api/analytics/dashboard-year-summary, /api/analytics/monthly-profit, /api/analytics/monthly-party (all include last_computed_at + was_recomputed), /api/analytics/sales-reconciliation (returns items[], grand_totals_all_items, excluded_items_totals, unassigned_stamp_totals, visible_net_after_returns_kg, total_raw_items, period). Frontend pages: /, /profit, /sales-reconciliation all functional. Production has 39K+ txns vs preview 11.7K - linear scaling should keep recompute under 1s.
rca of the issue: Original bug RCA: Dashboard read from pre-computed monthly_summaries collection that was stale due to fire-and-forget background recompute task failing silently. Fix: (1) Added _meta doc with fingerprint (txn count + max created_at) per year; (2) ensure_year_summary_fresh auto-detects stale and recomputes synchronously on read; (3) _safe_recompute_summaries wraps background recompute in try/except with logging; (4) all analytics endpoints return last_computed_at + was_recomputed for UI freshness indicator. Verified by re-running recompute and confirming subsequent reads return was_recomputed=false (data is fresh).
